description: Animated WebGL lightning-bolt background with fbm-distorted glow. Drop it behind content as a full-bleed background.
usage:
import Lightning from "./lightning"

<Lightning color="#3b5bff" speed={0.2} intensity={1} />
keyFeatures: Procedural lightning glow rendered entirely on the GPU via WebGL shaders.
Smooth float and distortion loops driven by configurable speed and intensity.
Toggle live animation or freeze a single frame for static export.
Editor preview mode renders one frame in the Framer canvas without burning GPU cycles.
descriptionParagraphs: Animated WebGL lightning-bolt background with fbm-distorted glow.
and angle through the controls panel — or use it as a static backdrop in the Framer editor.
